articles.summary: Racing Bulls have presented a striking one-off livery that will be used by the team across the Japanese Grand Prix weekend.

articles.title: Haas’ best off-track moments 10 years on from their debut
articles.summary: It’s been 10 years since Haas first took to the track in Formula 1 back in 2016 – to celebrate, here are some of their best off-track moments...

articles.title: Mercedes appoint new Deputy Team Principal
articles.summary: Mercedes have announced that Bradley Lord will become Deputy Team Principal with immediate effect, supporting Team Principal and CEO Toto Wolff on the senior leadership team.

articles.title: Why has Wheatley left Audi – and is he off to Aston Martin?
articles.summary: F1.com's Lawrence Barretto digs into the circumstances behind Jonathan Wheatley's departure as Audi Team Principal, and if Aston Martin are his next destination.
articles.author: Formula 1

articles.title: Audi announce team boss Wheatley to leave with immediate effect
articles.summary: Audi have announced that Team Principal Jonathan Wheatley is leaving the organisation with immediate effect, just under a year after his arrival.
articles.author: Formula 1

articles.title: Why Button feels ‘a little bit jealous’ of Alonso and Stroll
articles.summary: Jenson Button has shared how he would “love” to drive F1’s latest generation of cars – the new Aston Martin ambassador admitting he is also “a little bit jealous” of Fernando Alonso and Lance Stroll getting to work with design legend Adrian Newey.
articles.author: Formula 1

articles.title: Sainz reflects on leaving McLaren and potential lost title bid
articles.summary: Carlos Sainz admits he has no regrets over leaving McLaren for Ferrari at the end of 2020, despite losing the chance of possibly becoming a Formula 1 World Champion at his former team.

articles.title: Brown expects McLaren to win again ‘sooner rather than later’
articles.summary: Zak Brown is adamant that McLaren will be winning Grands Prix again “sooner rather than later” after two tricky weekends in Australia and China to kick off their season.
